description: HelixLLM CPU/GPU coder fleet exposed as a Google A2A (Agent2Agent) peer — accepts a code-generation Task and returns a completed Task whose Artifact carries the real model output.
name: helixllm-coder-a2a

skills.description: Accepts a natural-language coding request and returns generated source via the live model "/models/Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf".
examples: Write a Go function that returns the nth Fibonacci number.
skills.name: Generate code
